name: community-site-engine
description: Community Site Engine: a static site and simple CMS for community organizations.

scripts.dev: npm --workspace packages/shared run build && npm-run-all --parallel dev:api dev:admin dev:site
scripts.build: npm --workspace packages/shared run build && npm --workspace apps/site run build && npm --workspace apps/cms-admin run build && npm --workspace apps/cms-api run build && npm --workspace apps/cms-mcp run build
scripts.build:site: npm --workspace packages/shared run build && npm --workspace apps/site run build
scripts.check: npm --workspace packages/shared run build && npm --workspace apps/cms-api run check && npm --workspace apps/cms-admin run check && npm --workspace apps/site run check && npm --workspace apps/cms-mcp run check
